seconds.vision_desc: two white taper candles near a bright window, one flame leaning hard sideways
the tilted flame licks toward the second wick, smoke drifting
flame transfers, both wicks glowing, smoke curls upward
close-up of the leaning flame, melted rim of the taper trembling
smoke thickens and drifts left in the moving air
flame steadies briefly then bends again in the draught
wax rim glistens, flame guttering near the window edge
final frame of disturbed flame and smoke against cool daylight

windows.embed_text: two white taper candles close together, one tilted flame licking across to relight the other, a curl of smoke drifting, near a bright window, cool daylight mixed with warm flame | close-up of a leaning, disturbed candle flame and smoke
windows.embed_text_v2: two white taper candles close together, one tilted flame licking across to relight the other, a curl of smoke drifting, near a bright window, cool daylight mixed with warm flame | close-up of a leaning, disturbed candle flame and smoke
windows.summary_v2: A tilted taper's flame leans across to another wick, smoke curling in cool window light.
